title: Next steps
summary: Starter path: build locally, reuse the shared primitives, and let the validators guard the PDF.

bullets.title: Install dependencies
bullets.body: Install once for Playwright, qrcode, and the deck validation tooling.

bullets.title: Build the deck
bullets.body: Run npm run build to regenerate the deck PDF after slide or helper changes.

bullets.title: Validate visual changes
bullets.body: Refresh the render baseline after intentional visual changes, then rerun the quality gate.
